title: Manual JSON construction in push_subscription_set diverges from build_request() pattern
description: Every other method in misc.rs uses build_request(method_name, args) which encapsulates the using array and call-id. push_subscription_set hand-builds a JmapRequest directly with a hardcoded using vec and call_id=r1. This makes push_subscription_set look different from its siblings for no reason, and means a future refactor of build_request() will silently miss this method. Suggested rewrite: extend build_request() to accept an optional extra capability URI, or create a build_push_request() variant. The using array construction should not be inline in the method body.
close_reason: design decision: PushSubscription/set is account-independent and needs custom using array; build_request pattern does not apply
